title: caucalis gracilis
intro: Caucalis gracilis, also known as Small Bugloss, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Caucalis gracilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Caucalis gracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
